prompt: Photograph of a finished kitchen-cabinet repaint in a North Andover MA home — uppers and lowers in a soft matte sage green, smooth even brushed-and-rolled finish with no visible roller marks, original brushed-nickel cup pulls retained on lowers, simple knobs on uppers. White subway-tile backsplash and butcher-block counter visible. Single-bowl stainless sink at right. Soft daylight from a window outside the frame. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
